text: user: Hi I want to book a manicure for next Tuesday. assistant: I can help with that.
user: Can I get a pedicure this Friday?. assistant: Let me find a slot.
user: I need to schedule a haircut. assistant: What day works?
user: Book me a massage tomorrow morning. assistant: Checking availability.
user: I want to cancel my appointment from last week. assistant: I can help cancel.
user: Please cancel my booking I cannot make it. assistant: I will cancel it.
user: Remove my name from the schedule for March 3. assistant: One moment.
user: I need to move my Saturday appointment to Sunday. assistant: I can reschedule.
user: Reschedule my nail appointment to a later time. assistant: Which time?
user: Change my 2pm to 4pm please. assistant: Checking the calendar.
user: What are your hours this week. assistant: We are open 9 to 6.
user: Do you do gel nails and how much. assistant: Yes here are services.
user: Where are you located. assistant: We are downtown.
user: Um hello. assistant: How can I help.
user: garbled static noise. assistant: I did not catch that.
